channel.title: Business - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Disney Severance Packages Revealed for 1,000 Laid Off Employees - WDW News Today
item.description:
1. Disney Severance Packages Revealed for 1,000 Laid Off Employees  WDW News Today
  2. Disney Layoffs Hit Marvel Studios Hard  Forbes
  3. Here's the severance package Disney is giving to laid-off employees  Business Insider
  4. Disney axes 1,000 jobs, gutting Marvel's award-winning team — 1 artist was laid off in a room adorned with his own mural  Yahoo Finance
  5. Layoffs Hit Disney: 1,000 Jobs Cut as Josh D’Amaro Unveils Streamlining Push  The Hollywood Reporter

item.title: Airline adding bunk beds for economy travelers but bans snacks, smells and cuddling - AP News
item.description:
1. Airline adding bunk beds for economy travelers but bans snacks, smells and cuddling  AP News
  2. You’ve Heard of the Sky Couch. Get Ready for the Skynest.  The New York Times
  3. No double-bunking or snacks - but snoring is fine: Air New Zealand’s economy sleep pods set for launch  The Guardian
  4. Air New Zealand's Bunk Beds Will Soon Be Bookable Aboard Select Dreamliners  Condé Nast Traveler
  5. Airline unveils stacked bunk bed 'pods' as backlash builds over pricey, cramped way to fly  Fox News
